phase_name: Markup Geometry Precision — Snapping + Curved-Edge Measurement

completed_tasks.name: Redefine Phase 14: drop Pricing, set Markup Geometry Precision (ROADMAP + dir swap + STATE evolution)

remaining_tasks.name: PARKED: spike 001b — auto-count detect+review workflow to settle the >=98% accuracy question
OPTIONAL: commit/clean throwaway demo.html, or leave as spike artifact

decisions.decision: Drop Pricing & Item Library entirely from active roadmap
decisions.rationale: User chose measurement work as Phase 14 instead; pricing decisions D-16-D-22 preserved in v1.1-CONTEXT.md and revivable

decisions.decision: Phase 14 scope = spiked-and-validated only (snapping MM-06 + curved-edge measurement MM-05)
Snapping design: uniform grid-hash, cell = zoom-compensated tolerance (screenTolPx/zoom), segments indexed by tolerance-padded bbox, intersection-snap deferred
decisions.rationale: Spike 002: 2-15us at N=1k-50k, 0 mismatches; smaller-than-tolerance cells waste time

decisions.decision: Arc design: 3-point gesture, per-segment arc metadata carrying on-arc midpoint; area = shoelace +/- circular-segment with sign rule OUTWARD iff sign(cross)!=sign(shoelace); self-intersection guard on commit

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 14 (consider /gsd-discuss-phase 14 first to settle: snap toggle/keybind, 3-click-arc vs drag-to-bulge input, which snap types ship first).
context_notes: Came in cold (3.5 weeks away). v1.0 milestone is 100% complete (17 phases). Did a /gsd-spike gap analysis of measurement/markup, validated 3 feasibility spikes, then repurposed the empty Phase 14 slot from Pricing to the validated measurement work. Spikes are terminal — the live thread is planning Phase 14. User also has an UNRELATED untracked spike 004-toolbar-redesign + a throwaway demo.html in the tree; leave both alone.
